title: Vegan Turkish-Style Menemen
description: A flavorful and spicy vegan twist on the classic Turkish dish, made with eggs and vegetables.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: use tofu scramble as a vegan substitute

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Turkish red pepper flakes and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tofu scramble (or 2 eggs) and cook until set, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
